# 4. Molds (Types)

Hoon is statically typed with inference. A **mold** is both a type and a normalizing gate. `^-` asserts a type; a mismatch produces a `nest-fail`.

## Atoms and Auras

All atoms are unsigned integers. Auras annotate them for display but don't create separate runtime types. Arithmetic strips auras, producing plain `@`.
(add 0x15 15)     :: hex + decimal: auras erased, result is @

## Cell Types

`^` is any cell. `[@ @]` requires a pair of atoms. `[@ud @ux]` specifies the aura of each slot.

## Bunts

`^*  type` (or `*type`) gives the **bunt** — the default value of a mold. Used when you need a placeholder of the right shape.

## Vases

`!>  expr` (zapgar) wraps a value in a **vase** `[type value]`. Use `-:!>(x)` to extract just the type label.

## Type Unions

`$?` (bucwut) builds a union mold. Use `?-` (wuthep) to switch on a union value — it must be exhaustive.
